MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KEITH JACKSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KEITH JACKSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-18-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAMELA GILMORE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAMELA GILMORE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
